condition: earningsEpsGatedResidual(theta=0.75, market-neutral ATR gap residual AND EPS-surprise positive sign gate [surprise>0 via beatEstimates()]) [inline script]
mode: 300-sym sanity universe (full ~3,700-sym OOMs the 20GB heap, per prior PEAD FIRED events). Reduced universe => wide SEs, anti-conservative: a PASS is NOT validation, a clean FAIL is a STRONG fail.
spec: Successor #2 to the REJECTED price-based surprise-proxy class (condition-earningsgap raw gap + condition-earningsgapresidual market-neutral residual, BOTH design-time kills 2026-06-09 — regime sign-flip = beta-delivery, flat-tape negative). LAST price-INDEPENDENT surprise test before PEAD's surprise-proxy axis is abandoned. Residual script reused VERBATIM (quant-signed-off 2026-06-09 run-1): residualAtr = (open[g]-close[g-1])/atr[g-1] - (spyOpen[g]-spyClose[g-1])/spyAtr[g-1], SPY prev-day anchored to NAME prev.date, null-guard every SPY lookup, year>1900 + countTradingDaysBetween<=3 guards, entryDelayDays=1 (isolates POST-ENTRY drift), horizons 5/20/40, window 2000-01-01..2021-01-01 (ADR 0007 cap). ONLY addition: EPS SIGN gate `&& e.beatEstimates()` (surprise>0 strict) ANDed onto the final residual boolean — same earning `e` that drives the gap day (intended coupling: confirm the SIGN of the surprise that caused the gap). EPS confirms SIGN ONLY — never threshold EPS magnitude (S4 restatement risk). Sweep theta center 0.75 +-0.5 -> {0.25,0.75,1.25}. close-near-high EXCLUDED. any-earnings-no-gap reference arm (UNGATED).
data_quality_gate: PASS — PRD earnings table, 300 sanity symbols, 2000-2020: `surprise` field 100% non-null EVERY year; `surprisePercentage` only 79%(2000)->95%(2020) non-null (=> gate on `surprise>0` via beatEstimates, NOT surprisePercentage, to avoid ~20% early null-drop + divide-by-near-zero). Sign distribution non-degenerate (pos 43%->64%, neg 16%->28%, zero 41%->8%); gate thins the 36-57% zero+negative population (NOT a no-op, NOT always-positive). No pre-2005 sparsity (500-610 events/yr). Large early ZERO bucket = genuine EODHD-reported zeros (not null-masquerade), correctly excluded by strict >0 as 'unconfirmed'.
quant_signoff: APPROVE (quant-analyst 2026-06-09) — beatEstimates()/surprise>0 strict is correct field (coverage+numerical-stability+idiom); script placement + same-`e` coupling lookahead-free and intended; run-A-only-first concurred; ~20-25% thin is the MECHANISM under test (removes positive-gap-but-negative-fundamental-surprise cell = prime beta suspect), power adequate for the sign test.
pass_bar: THE decisive hurdle: NO SPY-regime 20d sign-flip AND flat-tape 20d meanLift >= +1.0% (BOTH priors died here: raw flat -0.38%, residual flat -0.52%/-0.20%). PLUS 20d post-entry meanLift-over-universe >= +1.5% AND >= 2x clustered SE; theta-monotonicity across {0.25,0.75,1.25} (1.25 cell not negative); horizon non-decay (20d>=5d, 40d>=20d-0.5%); firing spread across years.
kill_escalate: If the flat-tape 20d tertile ALSO sign-flips negative after EPS-gating, PEAD's surprise-proxy axis is EXHAUSTED — do NOT invent a 3rd price proxy. Escalate to operator/quant: (a) reconsider PEAD premise class, or (b) deferred sector-neutral residual (needs BacktestContext sector-quote-map engine change, issue #143 — do not build before it lands).

data_quality_gate: PASS — surprise 100% non-null 2000-2020, sign non-degenerate, gate thinned residual ~21% (3093->2443)
recommendation: REJECT (design-time kill) — pre-registered KILL TRIGGER fired (surprise-proxy axis EXHAUSTED)
step0_cadence: PASS — 2,443 signals, present all 21y, monotone ramp with universe growth, signalCount/dateCount 2443/1357 ~1.80 (not lumpy). NOT cadence-ceiling, NOT one-tape (lottery-vs-signature NOT triggered).
summary: Over-determined FAIL, all PASS-bar criteria failed. (1) DECISIVE KILL: 20d SPY-regime sign-flip PERSISTED after EPS sign-gating — down +0.99% (n664) / flat -0.31% (n903) / up -0.51% (n873); flat-tape NEGATIVE, near-equal firing across tertiles (genuine cross-sectional flip, not support artifact); bar required no-flip AND flat>=+1.0%. Third consecutive PEAD proxy flat-negative at 20d (raw -0.38%, residual -0.52%/-0.20%, EPS-gated -0.31%). (2) 20d headline meanLift -0.0069% = 0.03x clustered SE (SE 0.002694; bar +1.5% AND 2xSE) — condition 20d abs return +1.52% EXACTLY equals universe baseline = pure earnings-day beta, zero lift; 5d +0.14%/1.08xSE, 40d +0.28%/0.67xSE, |lift|<SE at 20d+40d. (3) Horizon non-monotone noise (5d +0.14% -> 20d -0.007% -> 40d +0.28%; 20d<5d) — not slow-diffusion accumulation. (4) theta-island ALL THREE cells negative at 20d {0.25:-0.056%, 0.75:-0.0069%, 1.25:-0.070%}, 1.25 negative — no surprise-magnitude monotonicity. Jaccard pooled 0.163 (distinct sub-population, no regime-orthogonal edge). Formal 4-clause ARS inconclusive-by-construction (firing not held +-15%, relativeStep 0.67; 20d swing 0.014% << 2x centre SE 0.539% = no swing because no edge) -> records as non-monotone-island tell + cross-sectional regime sign-flip.
new_finding: A price-INDEPENDENT fundamental EPS-sign gate did NOT strip the beta. Three independent surprise measures — raw OHLCV gap, OHLCV market-neutral residual, AND fundamental EPS-sign confirmation — all delivered SPY-direction beta with a negative flat tertile. The earnings-event long entry's beta is irreducible to ALL of: the gap itself, the same-night SPY-index gap, AND the EPS surprise sign. Beta-delivery via an event measure can be irreducible to EVERY surprise proxy expressible on current data, not merely a single same-day market factor.
candidate_impact: PEAD surprise-proxy axis EXHAUSTED (raw gap + market-neutral residual + EPS-gated residual all dead, all flat-negative). Slow-diffusion MECHANISM formally untouched, but every current-data entry proxy has failed identically. Per pre-registered fork: (a) reconsider PEAD premise class [route to quant-analyst], or (b) deferred sector-neutral residual — needs BacktestContext sector-quote-map engine change (issue #143), build as a NEW candidate from scratch only after #143 lands, never an iteration of a dead config.
disposition: NOT a firewall death — no config_hash burned, G13 brake NOT engaged. Do NOT invent a 4th price proxy. Do NOT iterate this config (no theta tuning, no bolting a regime gate = IS-fitting the sign-flip). Class-level decision (reconsider premise vs deferred sector path) belongs to operator + quant.
